mapper.insert: INSERT INTO CONSULTATION_MESSAGES ( MESSAGE_ID, SESSION_ID, SENDER_TYPE, SENDER_ID, MESSAGE_TYPE, CONTENT, IS_AI_GENERATED, AI_METADATA, IS_READ, DEL_FLAG, SENT_AT, UPDATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{messageId}, #{sessionId}, #{senderType}, #{senderId}, #{messageType}, #{content}, #{isAiGenerated}, #{aiMetadata}, #{isRead}, 0, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT MESSAGE_ID AS messageId, SESSION_ID AS sessionId, SENDER_TYPE AS senderType, SENDER_ID AS senderId, MESSAGE_TYPE AS messageType, CONTENT AS content, IS_AI_GENERATED AS isAiGenerated, AI_METADATA AS aiMetadata, IS_READ AS isRead, SENT_AT AS sentAt FROM CONSULTATION_MESSAGES WHERE SESSION_ID = #{sessionId} AND DEL_FLAG = 0 ORDER BY SENT_AT ASC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM CONSULTATION_MESSAGES WHERE SESSION_ID = #{sessionId} AND DEL_FLAG = 0

SELECT MESSAGE_ID AS messageId, SESSION_ID AS sessionId, SENDER_TYPE AS senderType, CONTENT AS content, SENT_AT AS sentAt FROM CONSULTATION_MESSAGES WHERE SESSION_ID = #{sessionId} AND DEL_FLAG = 0 ORDER BY SENT_AT DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT MESSAGE_ID AS messageId, AI_METADATA AS aiMetadata, CONTENT AS content FROM CONSULTATION_MESSAGES WHERE SESSION_ID = #{sessionId} AND SENDER_TYPE = 2 AND DEL_FLAG = 0 ORDER BY SENT_AT DESC LIMIT 1
